translation: If the real property is registered before the debt arises, the Civil Ruling of the Supreme People's Court (2020) Zui Gao Fa Min Shen No. 6800 held that the property purchased and registered by the person subject to enforcement in the name of his minor child constitutes family community property, and the share owned by the person subject to enforcement may be subject to enforcement. In Case No. (2022) Xiang 0725 Min Chu 3288, the Taoyuan County People's Court of Hunan Province held that, in the absence of sufficient evidence proving the true intention of the debtor and his spouse to donate the property to their minor daughter at the time of purchase, and where the minor daughter also failed to provide evidence of any investment or contribution to the property in question, the court, taking into account the actual funding, current usage, social circumstances, and other relevant facts, and balancing the interests of both the creditor and the debtor, determined that the property in question constitutes the community property of the debtor and his spouse.
